title: Syrian Resinous Tagine
description: A hearty, egg-free Syrian dish made with dijon mustard and a unique cooking technique.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add dried thyme, ground cinnamon, and ground allspice. Stir to combine.
Add dijon mustard and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Stir in apricot jam and flour. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer for an additional 10-15 minutes.
Stir in pumpkin seeds and honey. Cook for 1-2 minutes, until heated through.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Transfer the mixture to a wooden board and refrigerate until chilled.
Before serving, place the wooden board in an ice bath to shock the mixture.
Once chilled, slice the tagine and serve cold.
